name: Jade Tree Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the sesame seeds in a skillet over low heat until lightly browned.
2. In a large jar, combine all ingredients except for the torn lettuce and fresh black pepper.
3. Shake the jar to blend all the ingredients thoroughly.
4. Chill the mixture for at least 3 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. Tear the iceberg lettuce into bite-sized pieces (not cut).
6. Toss the lettuce with a generous amount of freshly ground black pepper.
7. Serve over the chilled lettuce, dividing it among plates or bowls.
Per serving: 241 calories. Waikiki Beach, Hawaii
